moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Kicks Off!
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green is alive with TRNSMT Festival this weekend, featuring headliners like Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi across three days of music.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Glasgow Green is absolutely buzzing! TRNSMT Festival is officially ON, bringing massive acts like Richard Ashcroft and Kasabian to Scotland. Who are you buzzing to see live this weekend?

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: It's all happening in Glasgow! TRNSMT Festival is taking over Glasgow Green this weekend. If you're heading down, stay safe and soak up the incredible atmosphere!

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Live
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival is in full swing this weekend, running from June 18-21, bringing a huge line-up of pop, rock, and electronic acts to Seaclose Park.

angles.name: Festival Weekend
angles.copy: Sun's out (hopefully!) and the music's pumping! The Isle of Wight Festival is bringing the party this weekend. Are you there? What's been your highlight so far?

angles.name: Southern Sounds
angles.copy: The Isle of Wight is the place to be this weekend! The festival is live with incredible artists. Who are you seeing perform on the island?

moments.title: Parklife Festival Takes Over Manchester
moments.blurb: Parklife Festival is happening this weekend, June 20-21, at Heaton Park in Manchester, featuring a diverse lineup of electronic, pop, and rap artists.

angles.name: Manchester Party
angles.copy: Manchester! Parklife is officially underway at Heaton Park this weekend. Get ready for an epic lineup of dance, pop, and rap. Who's your must-see act?

angles.name: Northern Festival
angles.copy: Heaton Park is buzzing! Parklife Festival is bringing the biggest names to Manchester this weekend. What a vibe!

moments.title: Africa Oyé Celebrates in Liverpool
moments.blurb: The UK's largest free African music and culture festival, Africa Oyé, is taking place this weekend, June 20-21, in Liverpool's Sefton Park.

angles.name: Free Festival Fun
angles.copy: Liverpool's Sefton Park is the place to be this weekend for Africa Oyé! The UK's biggest free celebration of African music and culture is bringing incredible vibes. Who's heading down?

angles.name: Cultural Celebration
angles.copy: Music, culture, and good times! Africa Oyé in Liverpool is a fantastic free festival this weekend. Don't miss the chance to experience it!

moments.title: Summer Solstice Tomorrow
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the astronomical first day of summer and the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs tomorrow, Sunday, June 21, 2026, at 9:24 AM BST in the UK.

angles.name: Longest Day Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for the longest day of the year! Tomorrow is the Summer Solstice, officially kicking off astronomical summer. What are your plans to soak up all that extra daylight?

angles.name: Summer Begins
angles.copy: Summer officially begins tomorrow! The Summer Solstice means maximum daylight hours. We're ready for those long, light evenings!

moments.title: Lionel Richie Turns 77
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday today, June 20, 2026.

angles.name: Music Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the incredible Lionel Richie! From The Commodores to a phenomenal solo career, his music is truly 'Easy' to love. What's your favourite Lionel track?

angles.name: Soulful Celebration
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only Lionel Richie on his 77th birthday today! His timeless songs have soundtracked so many moments. Send him some love!

moments.title: Chino Moreno Turns 53
moments.blurb: Chino Moreno, the distinctive frontman of alternative metal band Deftones, celebrates his 53rd birthday today, June 20, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 53rd Birthday to the iconic Chino Moreno of Deftones! His unique vocals and stage presence have defined a genre. What's your go-to Deftones track?

angles.name: Deftones Fan Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Chino Moreno! The Deftones frontman turns 53 today. Time to crank up some classics!

moments.title: John Taylor Turns 66
moments.blurb: John Taylor, the co-founder and bassist of the iconic New Wave band Duran Duran, celebrates his 66th birthday today, June 20, 2026.

angles.name: New Wave Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the legendary John Taylor of Duran Duran! His basslines are pure 80s magic. What's your favourite Duran Duran hit?

angles.name: Duran Duran Tribute
angles.copy: Celebrating the cool and charismatic John Taylor of Duran Duran on his 66th birthday! Still looking 'Hungry Like the Wolf' for more amazing music!

moments.title: England vs Ghana in World Cup
moments.blurb: England continues their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign against Ghana on Tuesday, June 23, with kick-off at 9 PM BST, live on BBC One.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: Three Lions in action! England face Ghana in the World Cup this Tuesday at 9 PM BST on BBC One. Can they secure another win? Predictions, please!

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup journey continues! England vs Ghana, Tuesday night, 9 PM BST. Where will you be watching the big game?

moments.title: Panama vs England World Cup
moments.blurb: England's final group stage match in the FIFA World Cup 2026 sees them take on Panama on Saturday, June 27, with a 10 PM BST kick-off, live on ITV1.

angles.name: Weekend Football
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! England's final World Cup group game is this Saturday against Panama, 10 PM BST on ITV1. Will they top the group?

angles.name: Group Stage Finale
angles.copy: Saturday night World Cup football! England vs Panama is set to be a decider for the group. Get your snacks ready for a 10 PM BST kick-off!

moments.title: Wimbledon Qualifiers Begin
moments.blurb: The road to Wimbledon begins as the qualifying rounds for The Championships 2026 kick off on Monday, June 22, at Roehampton.

angles.name: Tennis Season Begins
angles.copy: Wimbledon season officially gets underway on Monday! The qualifying rounds start at Roehampton. Who are you hoping to see make it to the main draw?

angles.name: Road to SW19
angles.copy: The grass court action is about to heat up! Wimbledon qualifiers start Monday. Get ready for two weeks of world-class tennis!

moments.title: Wimbledon Main Draw Starts
moments.blurb: The main draw for The Championships, Wimbledon 2026, begins on Monday, June 29, promising two weeks of world-class tennis at the All England Club.

angles.name: Tennis Grand Slam
angles.copy: It's almost time! Wimbledon's main tournament kicks off Monday, June 29th. Get ready for the return of grass-court glory and strawberries and cream!

angles.name: Who Will Win?
angles.copy: The most prestigious tennis tournament in the world starts next Monday! Who are your picks for the men's and women's singles titles at Wimbledon?

moments.title: Premier League 2026/27 Fixtures Released
moments.blurb: The full fixture list for the 2026/27 Premier League season was released yesterday, June 19, with defending champions Arsenal kicking off against Coventry City on August 21.

angles.name: Football Back!
angles.copy: The wait is over! Premier League fixtures for the 2026/27 season are OUT. Who has the toughest start? What's your team's opening match highlight?

angles.name: Season Planner
angles.copy: Time to start planning your weekends! The new Premier League season's fixtures are here. Arsenal vs Coventry kicks things off. What game are you most looking forward to?

moments.title: EFL Fixtures Announced Next Week
moments.blurb: The fixtures for the 2026/27 EFL Championship, League One, and League Two seasons, along with the EFL Cup first round draw, will be announced on Thursday, June 25.

angles.name: Lower League Excitement
angles.copy: EFL fans, get ready! The 2026/27 Championship, League One, and League Two fixtures drop next Thursday, June 25th. Which team's schedule are you most eager to see?

angles.name: Cup Draw Too!
angles.copy: Not just league fixtures, the EFL Cup first round draw is also next Thursday! Who do you want your team to face?

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The latest Official UK Singles Chart sees Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' dip to number 4, while new entries include Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' and Alex Warren's 'Passenger'.

angles.name: Chart Movers
angles.copy: New music alert! The Official Singles Chart is out. Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still huge, and Taylor Swift has a new entry. What's your favourite right now?

angles.name: New Music Friday
angles.copy: The charts are always moving! Catch up with the latest Official Singles Chart. Any surprises in the Top 40 this week?

moments.title: Harlan Coben's Final Twist on ITVX
moments.blurb: A new true crime series, 'Harlan Coben's Final Twist', where the author explores real murder investigations and high-profile crimes, arrives on ITVX tomorrow, Sunday, June 21.

angles.name: True Crime Fix
angles.copy: Your next true crime obsession is here! Harlan Coben's Final Twist lands on ITVX tomorrow. If you love a good mystery, this is for you.

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: Looking for something to binge this Sunday? 'Harlan Coben's Final Twist' is coming to ITVX. Get ready for some gripping real-life investigations!

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3
moments.blurb: The third season of the epic Game of Thrones prequel, 'House of the Dragon', premieres on HBO Max (likely Sky Atlantic/NOW TV in the UK) on Monday, June 22.

angles.name: Fantasy Returns
angles.copy: Dragons are back! House of the Dragon Season 3 lands Monday. Get ready for more Targaryen drama and epic battles. Who's excited?

angles.name: Must-Watch Monday
angles.copy: The wait is nearly over! House of the Dragon returns for its third season this Monday. Clear your schedules!

moments.title: Beyond Paradise Season 4
moments.blurb: The popular 'Death in Paradise' spin-off, 'Beyond Paradise', returns for its fourth season, premiering on BritBox on Wednesday, June 24.

angles.name: Cosy Crime Returns
angles.copy: Humphrey and Martha are back! Beyond Paradise Season 4 premieres this Wednesday on BritBox. More charming mysteries and Devon scenery await!

angles.name: Devon Delights
angles.copy: Great news for Devon fans! Beyond Paradise Season 4 kicks off on BritBox this Wednesday. Get ready for more beautiful local backdrops and intriguing cases!

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger Turns 48
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for her work with The Pussycat Dolls and as a judge on The X Factor, celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29, 2026.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a fabulous 48th Birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger on June 29th! From Pussycat Dolls to solo hits, she's a true star. What's your favourite of her songs?

angles.name: X Factor Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Nicole Scherzinger's birthday next Monday! The pop powerhouse turns 48. What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls anthem?
